items.name: theme
items.description: BoldKit neubrutalism theme with bold colors and CSS variables

items.name: utils
items.description: Utility functions for className merging

items.name: use-theme
items.description: Theme provider hook with light/dark/system support and localStorage persistence. Used by Sonner toast for theme-aware rendering.

items.name: error-boundary
items.description: Error boundary wrapper with neubrutalism-styled fallback UI. Used by math-curve components to catch runtime errors gracefully.

items.description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings with neubrutalism styling

items.description: Displays a callout for user attention with bold neubrutalism borders

items.description: Displays content within a desired ratio

items.name: avatar
items.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user

items.description: Displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge with neubrutalism styling

items.name: breadcrumb
items.description: Displays the path to the current resource using a hierarchy of links

items.description: Displays a button with neubrutalism styling and press-down animation

items.name: card
items.description: Displays a card with header, content, and footer with thick borders and shadows

items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked

items.description: Used to show a placeholder while content is loading

items.description: A jelly slider with spring physics and bouncy animations

items.description: An opinionated toast component with neubrutalism styling

items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between on and off

items.description: A responsive table component with neubrutalism styling

items.description: A two-state button that can be either on or off

items.description: A modal dialog for important confirmations with neubrutalism styling

items.name: calendar
items.description: A date picker calendar with neubrutalism styling

items.description: A drawer component that slides in from the edge of the screen

items.description: A card that appears on hover with additional information

items.description: One-time password input with neubrutalism styling

items.description: Pagination controls for navigating through pages

items.description: Beautiful charts with neubrutalism styling built on Recharts

items.name: marquee
items.description: Auto-scrolling text ticker with neubrutalism styling - a common brutalist design element

items.name: sticker
items.description: Rotated labels and stamps with tape effect and double borders - neubrutalist decorative elements

items.name: layered-card
items.description: Card component with stacked layers effect showing offset depth - neubrutalist depth illusion

items.name: shapes
items.description: 55 neubrutalist SVG shapes organized by category for badges, decorations, and visual accents

items.description: BoldKit neubrutalism CSS variables and utilities

items.description: Loading spinner with multiple animation variants - dots, bars, blocks, and brutal shadow spin

items.description: Keyboard key indicator for displaying shortcuts and hotkeys with neubrutalism styling

items.name: stat-card
items.description: Statistics card with trend indicators, icons, and optional progress bars

items.description: Multi-step form wizard with progress indicators, compound components pattern

items.name: dropzone
items.description: Drag-and-drop file upload with validation, progress tracking, and file list

items.name: sparkline
items.description: Tiny inline trend charts for tables and stat cards - line, area, and bar variants

items.name: donut-chart
items.description: Pie chart with center hole for KPI display, supports center content slot

items.name: radial-bar-chart
items.description: Circular progress bars with nested rings for multiple metrics

items.name: radar-chart
items.description: Multi-variable comparison chart for skills, metrics, and feature comparisons

items.name: gauge-chart
items.description: Speedometer-style gauge with color zones and animated needle - custom SVG implementation

items.name: funnel-chart
items.description: Funnel chart for conversion flows and pipeline stages with neubrutalism styling

items.name: treemap-chart
items.description: Treemap for hierarchical data visualization with proportional rectangles

items.name: heatmap-chart
items.description: Heatmap grid for correlation and intensity data - custom CSS Grid implementation

items.name: sankey-chart
items.description: Sankey flow diagram for showing proportional flows between nodes - custom SVG implementation

items.name: rating
items.description: Star rating component with half-values, multiple icons, and keyboard navigation

items.name: tag-input
items.description: Multi-tag input with suggestions, validation, and keyboard support

items.name: time-picker
items.description: Popover-based time picker with 12h/24h format and scrollable columns

items.name: date-range-picker
items.description: Date range picker with presets, dual calendars, and customizable options

items.name: data-table
items.description: Powerful data table with sorting, filtering, pagination, and row selection

items.name: carousel
items.description: Carousel component with navigation, dots, and touch support built on Embla

items.name: timeline
items.description: Composable timeline for activity feeds, order tracking, and version history

items.name: tree-view
items.description: Hierarchical tree view with expand/collapse, selection, and checkboxes

items.name: sidebar
items.description: Collapsible sidebar with mobile drawer, tooltips, and keyboard shortcut

items.name: tour
items.description: Step-by-step product tour with spotlight highlighting and progress indicators

items.name: empty-state
items.description: Empty state component with icon, title, description, and optional actions

items.name: math-curves
items.description: Framework-agnostic math engine for parametric curve animations (rose, lissajous, butterfly, hypotrochoid, cardioid, lemniscate, fourier, spiral, heart)

items.name: math-curve-loader
items.description: Animated mathematical curve loader with neubrutalism aesthetics — 8 curve variants including rose, lissajous, butterfly, and more

items.name: math-curve-progress
items.description: Progress indicator that traces a mathematical curve — value-driven head moves along the curve path from 0 to 100%

items.name: math-curve-background
items.description: Ambient animated mathematical curve background layer with neubrutalism aesthetics — wraps content with a slow-moving curve animation

items.name: ascii-shapes
items.description: 7 animated ASCII art components (Spiral, Rose, Wave, Vortex, Pulse, Matrix, Grid) with 5 character sets, 4 sizes, and SSR-safe static mode

items.name: motion
items.description: BoldKit Motion System — framework-agnostic CSS tokens, keyframes, and six signature recipes (press, stamp-in, shake, reveal, slide-hard, pulse-shadow). Mobile-optimized, honors prefers-reduced-motion.

items.name: motion-core
items.description: BoldKit Motion core — framework-agnostic, SSR-safe primitives (observeReveal, staggerChildren, triggerAnimation, startViewTransition, prefersReducedMotion) shared by every motion adapter.

items.name: motion-react
items.description: BoldKit Motion React adapter — <Motion>/<Reveal>/<Stagger> components plus useShake and useViewTransition hooks over a framework-agnostic core.

items.name: chart-export
items.description: BoldKit chart export helpers — framework-agnostic, SSR-safe CSV / PNG / SVG download and fullscreen toggle. Works with any chart engine that renders an <svg> (Recharts) or <canvas> (ECharts).

items.name: chart-toolbar
items.description: Brutalist chart toolbar overlay — export the wrapped chart as PNG or SVG, download its data as CSV, and toggle fullscreen.
